title: AOI v0.2
description: Analysis Operation Interface v0.2 canonical schema.

metric.description: Semantic metric identifier to diagnose. Diagnose runs against exactly one metric.

time_scope.description: Time range scanned by the internal detect step before follow-up diagnosis.

granularity.description: Time bucket granularity used by the internal detect scan.

filter.description: Optional AOI expression applied to both candidate detection and follow-up observe/compare/decompose steps.

scan_dimension.description: Optional single dimension used only to split the internal detect scan into independent time series. Omit to scan the overall metric series.

dimensions.description: Non-empty attribution dimension list used after anomaly candidates are found. These dimensions drive follow-up decompose steps and are independent of scan_dimension.

strategy.description: Detection strategy passed to the internal detect step.

sensitivity.description: Detection sensitivity preset passed to the internal detect step. Defaults to aggressive.

candidate_limit.description: Maximum number of anomaly candidates diagnosed end-to-end. This bounds follow-up candidates, not driver rows.

decomposition_limit.description: Maximum number of driver rows returned per diagnosed candidate and attribution dimension.
